subject: [PATCH v2 9/9] nfsd: unify cleanups in nfsd_cross_mnt() exits

2026-06-02.patch_summary: This patch refactors the nfsd_cross_mnt() function to move all path_put() and exp_put() calls to a single location after the codepaths join, ensuring consistent ordering between these operations. This change simplifies the cleanup process in this critical function, reducing complexity and improving maintainability.
